Entropy-Guided Question Selectionconverts free-form user input into the structured state used
by retrieval, entropy computation, and ranking. A central challenge in conversational recommendation is determining what to ask. IDSS selects question dimensions using an entropy-guided rule computed over the current candidate set. Entropy Computation Let C denote the candidate set retrieved using current filters F. Let D be the set of all attribute
dimensions. For each dimension d ∈D, we compute Shannon entropy (Shannon 1948):
